name: gufranco-claude-engineering
description: Curated bundles of rules, hooks, and standards extracted from the gufranco/claude-engineering-rules config. Install one slice at a time instead of the whole config.

plugins.name: compliance-pack
plugins.description: GDPR-grade privacy, WCAG 2.2 AA+ accessibility, ePrivacy cookies, cybersecurity, anti-spam, AI compliance defaults and the standards they cite. Strictest-applicable-rule-wins policy.

plugins.name: ts-strictness-pack
plugins.description: Maximum TypeScript strictness: immutability by default, branded types, ORM migration parity, the mutation-method-blocker hook covering 90+ patterns across 16 categories.
